# ai-cv

> AI-native living resume — ai-cv.ha7ch.com

Turn a PDF resume into a personal site at `ai-cv.ha7ch.com/{handle}`. Any AI agent can create, read, and update it via CLI or MCP — no browser required for setup.

## What it is

- **Public resume page** at `ai-cv.ha7ch.com/{handle}`
- **CLI** (`npx ai-cv@latest`) for terminal or AI agent use
- **MCP server** at `https://ai-cv.ha7ch.com/api/mcp` for direct tool integration

## How to set up a new account (for AI agents)

1. Ask the user: "What handle do you want? (ai-cv.ha7ch.com/{handle})"
2. Run: `npx ai-cv@latest register {handle}` — claims the handle and saves the token automatically
3. Optionally publish a resume: `npx ai-cv@latest update resume.json`
4. Confirm: `npx ai-cv@latest whoami`

No browser needed. No token copying. One command from zero to live page.

## CLI commands

```
npx ai-cv@latest register <handle>          # claim handle + auto-login
npx ai-cv@latest login <cv_pat_...>         # save existing token
npx ai-cv@latest whoami                     # show handle + live URL
npx ai-cv@latest get                        # fetch resume JSON
npx ai-cv@latest update <file.json>         # replace full resume
npx ai-cv@latest update-section <section> <file.json>
npx ai-cv@latest open                       # open live page in browser
```

## MCP setup

Replace `cv_pat_...` with your token from ai-cv.ha7ch.com.

**Claude Code (CLI)**
```bash
claude mcp add cv --transport http https://ai-cv.ha7ch.com/api/mcp \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer cv_pat_..."
```

**Cursor** — add to `~/.cursor/mcp.json`:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "cv": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://ai-cv.ha7ch.com/api/mcp",
      "headers": { "Authorization": "Bearer cv_pat_..." }
    }
  }
}
```

**Codex** — add to `~/.codex/config.json`:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "cv": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://ai-cv.ha7ch.com/api/mcp",
      "headers": { "Authorization": "Bearer cv_pat_..." }
    }
  }
}
```

MCP tools: `get_resume`, `update_resume`, `update_section`

## Resume sections

`header` · `personalInfo` · `experience` · `education` · `projectsRecent` · `projectsDetailed` · `skills` · `contact`

## npm package

`ai-cv` on npm — https://www.npmjs.com/package/ai-cv

## Source

https://github.com/LAWTED/ai-cv
